item.title: About
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
1 Digital Product User Reseach Testing PR Manager 2 Visual Identity Brand Experiences Brand Strategy Branding Studio 3 Websites Web Design Interactive Experiences Framer Development [ 02 ]

Showreel

R https://github.com/GradiaThemes/orvian-demo-data/raw/refs/heads/main/images/White_supercar_commercial_video.mp4https://github.com/GradiaThemes/orvian-demo-data/raw/refs/heads/main/images/White_supercar_commercial_video.mp4 25 Visual Design Product Design Brand Design & Strategy Brand Design & Strategy 10 Years of Experiences Over 100+ Customers Team of Experts [ 06 ]

My Skills

Building wesbite
people can’t ignore 80% No-code website 98% UI/UX design tool 92% Interactive prototype

With 10+ Other Skills related to Design, Development

[ 01 ]

INTRODUCTION

I’m Orvian, a graphic
designer Based
Berlin, GErmany I create work that blends bold ideas, thoughtful details, and
clear vision to stand out and connect. See my Linkedin 2021

UI/UX Designer

Frog Design Freelancer 2023

Senior UI/UX Designer

Fantasy Raw Studio 2025

Art Director

Freelancer Clay Company 2021

UI/UX Designer

Frog Design Freelancer 2023

Senior UI/UX Designer

Fantasy Raw Studio 2025

Art Director

Freelancer Clay Company [ 08 ]

COMPANY

Orvian [ 09 ]

TESTIMONIALS

@2025 Admired A few words from the people I’ve had the
chance to work with. “Orvian has a rare talent for blending bold creativity with precise execution.” Martin Luther King Q INDUSTRIAL “He understood exactly what we wanted, and HE delivered designs that were both beautiful and on point.” Mary Giggle SPORTIFY “Brought our vision to life beautifully.” Martin Scoresese EMOTIV INDUSTRY “Designs that truly stand out.” Logan Cee LGC STUDIO “Orvian doesn’t just design — he listens, interprets, and creates something that feels alive. Anika Ling STORIICARE [ 10 ]

Plan

PRICING
PLAN ( 02 ) Basic Single Project Have design ready to build? Or small budget?
  • Wireframe to visual design (Figma/Framer)
  • Implementation with Webflow or WordPress
  • Responsive design for desktop & mobile
  • Delivery within business days
  • 1–2 rounds of revisions
From $799 /project Premium Multi Project Have design ready to build? Or small budget?
  • Advanced design (UI/UX, prototype, animation)
  • Full implementation with Webflow, React, or WordPress
  • Pixel-perfect, scalable, and SEO-friendly code
  • Custom features & integrations
  • Priority support and unlimited revisions
  • Fast turnaround with dedicated communication
From $1299 /project Basic Single Project Have design ready to build? Or small budget?
  • Wireframe to visual design (Figma/Framer)
  • Implementation with Webflow or WordPress
  • Responsive design for desktop & mobile
  • Delivery within business days
  • 1–2 rounds of revisions
From $799 /project Premium Multi Project Have design ready to build? Or small budget?
  • Advanced design (UI/UX, prototype, animation)
  • Full implementation with Webflow, React, or WordPress
  • Pixel-perfect, scalable, and SEO-friendly code
  • Custom features & integrations
  • Priority support and unlimited revisions
  • Fast turnaround with dedicated communication
From $1299 /project [ 03 ]

AWARDS

Around the
World A look at the moments when my work was recognized
by industry leaders and global competitions. Let’s talk Site of the Day #Awwwards Best UI Design #CSS Design Graphic Design #Behance Site of the Day #Awwwards Best UI Design #CSS Design Graphic Design #Behance [ 11 ]

COMMON ASK

FAQ

Why’s Orvian instead of full-time designer?

How quick is quick? For most design, we’re talking 2-3 business days. We balance speed with quality, ensuring you get top-north design swiftly

How quick is quick? For most design, we’re talking 2-3 business days. We balance speed with quality, ensuring you get top-north design swiftly

item.title: Services
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
3 The Work Scope Creative Focus 3 Creative Focus [ 01 ] My Services

UI DESIGN

UI/UX Web Design

Designing interfaces that feel clear, intuitive, and visually engaging, turning complex ideas into seamless user experiences.

Let’s talk [ 02 ] My Services

Animation

Motion Design Animated Graphics

Animation brings graphics to life through motion and timing, transforming static visuals into dynamic experiences. It adds rhythm, depth, and guiding attention.

Let’s talk [ 03 ] My Services

ART VISUAL

User Interface Visual Design

UI focuses on usability, ensuring every interaction feels smooth and intuitive, while Visual Design highlights aesthetics, shaping the look and feel.

item.title: OMATO
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges
& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to
convey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved
more sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

Animation

BrandingVisual

item.title: Animation
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges n& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to nconvey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved nmore sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

DRIFTY

BrandingVisual

Hensor

BrandingVisual

AuRORA

BrandingVisual

UI DESIGN

BrandingVisual

WANDA PROB.

BrandingVisual

AVANTGarde

BrandingVisual

OMATO

BrandingVisual

Performance

ART VISUAL

BrandingVisual

Emotiv

item.title: Why Motion Matters:Breathing Life into Digital Experiences.
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01]

INTRODUCTION

Secure Leadership Buy-In

Creating a truly data-driven culture isn’t just about having data—it’s about building the right processes, systems, and habits that make data central to decision-making, empowering teams, improving collaboration, driving innovation, and ensuring organizations stay agile, competitive, and future-ready in a rapidly evolving business landscape. To achieve this structural shift, executive sponsorship is absolutely non-negotiable.

" Great digital design breathes. Motion is its pulse. "

Define Clear Data Processes

Set clear expectations that strategies, campaigns, and operations are backed by data, ensuring measurable goals, accountability, transparency, and alignment with organizational objectives for consistent growth, innovation, and informed decision-making across all departments. This structural alignment requires dismantling traditional organizational silos and architecting a unified digital ecosystem. When every terminal operates under the same absolute logic, subjective guesswork is permanently eliminated. To enforce this paradigm shift, organizations must rigorously execute the following directives:

  • Standardize how data is collected, stored, and maintained: Implement universal systems that prevent fragmentation and ensure all inputs are structurally compatible across the entire network.
  • Establish protocols for data governance, accuracy, and consistency: Deploy rigorous validation checkpoints to eliminate compromised data sets and establish absolute trust in the core operational metrics.
  • Create workflows that integrate data analysis into everyday decision-making: Transition from reactive reporting to proactive, automated analytical loops that guide strategic trajectories in real-time.

You can see a live demo in Here.

  • Establish protocols for data governance, accuracy, and consistency: Deploy rigorous validation checkpoints to eliminate compromised data sets and establish absolute trust in the core operational metrics.
  • Create workflows that integrate data analysis into everyday decision-making: Transition from reactive reporting to proactive, automated analytical loops that guide strategic trajectories in real-time.

item.title: WANDA PROB.
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges n& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to nconvey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved nmore sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

Performance

BrandingVisual

AuRORA

BrandingVisual

Hensor

BrandingVisual

BrandingVisual

UI DESIGN

item.title: Emotiv
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges n& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to nconvey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved nmore sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

DRIFTY

BrandingVisual

Hensor

BrandingVisual

Performance

BrandingVisual

OMATO

BrandingVisual

Animation

BrandingVisual

WANDA PROB.

BrandingVisual

AVANTGarde

BrandingVisual

UI DESIGN

BrandingVisual

ART VISUAL

BrandingVisual

AuRORA

BrandingVisual

item.title: AVANTGarde
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges n& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to nconvey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved nmore sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

Emotiv

BrandingVisual

UI DESIGN

BrandingVisual

Animation

BrandingVisual

WANDA PROB.

BrandingVisual

AuRORA

BrandingVisual

ART VISUAL

BrandingVisual

DRIFTY

BrandingVisual

OMATO

BrandingVisual

Performance

BrandingVisual

Hensor

BrandingVisual

item.title: ART VISUAL
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges n& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to nconvey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved nmore sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

DRIFTY

BrandingVisual

AVANTGarde

BrandingVisual

UI DESIGN

BrandingVisual

WANDA PROB.

BrandingVisual

Performance

BrandingVisual

AuRORA

BrandingVisual

OMATO

BrandingVisual

Emotiv

BrandingVisual

Animation

BrandingVisual

Hensor

BrandingVisual

item.title: UI DESIGN
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges n& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to nconvey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved nmore sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

AuRORA

BrandingVisual

AVANTGarde

BrandingVisual

Emotiv

BrandingVisual

Hensor

BrandingVisual

WANDA PROB.

BrandingVisual

Animation

BrandingVisual

ART VISUAL

BrandingVisual

Performance

BrandingVisual

OMATO

BrandingVisual

DRIFTY

BrandingVisual

item.title: Hensor
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges n& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to nconvey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved nmore sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

ART VISUAL

BrandingVisual

OMATO

BrandingVisual

AuRORA

BrandingVisual

DRIFTY

BrandingVisual

Animation

BrandingVisual

Emotiv

BrandingVisual

WANDA PROB.

BrandingVisual

UI DESIGN

BrandingVisual

AVANTGarde

BrandingVisual

Performance

BrandingVisual

item.title: DRIFTY
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges n& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to nconvey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved nmore sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

WANDA PROB.

BrandingVisual

Hensor

BrandingVisual

OMATO

BrandingVisual

UI DESIGN

BrandingVisual

Animation

BrandingVisual

AuRORA

BrandingVisual

Emotiv

BrandingVisual

Performance

BrandingVisual

ART VISUAL

BrandingVisual

AVANTGarde

BrandingVisual

item.title: AuRORA
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges n& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to nconvey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved nmore sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

ART VISUAL

BrandingVisual

Animation

BrandingVisual

UI DESIGN

BrandingVisual

Emotiv

BrandingVisual

OMATO

BrandingVisual

BrandingVisual

BrandingVisual

WANDA PROB.

item.title: Performance
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
[01] INTRODUCTION Introduction In 2024, AeroLogix, a leading logistics and supply chain management company, approached Boltshift to redesign their outdated website. The goal was to create a modern, high-performance platform that would streamline their customer experience, improve brand perception, and enhance lead generation. Year 2024 Client Jimmy Wood Timeline February 2025 Service Branding Identity [02] OVER VIEW Challenges n& Opportunities

Their existing marketing content lacked energy and failed to nconvey the premium feel of their brand, which truly deserved nmore sophistication and dynamism.

Solutions [03] DETAILS

We created sleek, high-energy motion graphics for social media and digital ads, showcasing their cars in a cinematic style, highlighting speed and luxury with dynamic camera angles and vibrant color grading to drive engagement and elevate the brand's perception as a leader in automotive excellence.

[04] Other Works Other Works

AuRORA

BrandingVisual

DRIFTY

BrandingVisual

ART VISUAL

BrandingVisual

BrandingVisual

Emotiv

BrandingVisual

item.title: Contact form 1
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
<label> Your name [text* your-name autocomplete:name] </label>
<label> Your email [email* your-email autocomplete:email] </label>
<label> Subject [text* your-subject] </label>
<label> Your message (optional) [textarea your-message] </label>
[submit "Submit"] [_site_title] "[your-subject]" [_site_title] <wordpress@wordpress.test> From: [your-name] [your-email] Subject: [your-subject]
Message Body: [your-message]
-- This is a notification that a contact form was submitted on your website ([_site_title] [_site_url]). [_site_admin_email] Reply-To: [your-email]
0 0
